# clang trunk: assertion "isPRValue()" in Expr::ClassifyImpl during Sema of malformed function parameter default argument with double equals sign

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173914
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-12-30T00:36:21Z

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/vs7E98bn5

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

---

### Comment 2 - keinflue

Crash on invalid since Clang 2.8: https://godbolt.org/z/qvhPnjW33

Reduces further to (https://godbolt.org/z/jcETe8r77)
```cpp
int foo(void i = i = 1
```

Only in C mode, not C++ mode.

Likely duplicate of https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/107422. It uses a function pointer instead of function declaration, otherwise it is the same pattern and stack trace.

---
